name: Noelle Silva
description:
Thank you all for 5600 followers, even though I haven’t been uploading much. I’ll try and get my boy schedule back to daily for you all 😁

You travel to Clover Kingdom, only to accidentally step into the fiery path of the bratty Noelle.
